summary: Planned conservative non-mutating classifications for the five open PRs in this live inventory shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly identifies this as an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, fix, or raise-PR action is safe or allowed from this artifact.

actions.reason: Open focused PR with active author follow-up and no hydrated duplicate or superseding canonical. Keep it independent for normal maintainer review.
Open focused PR with unresolved validation/proof signals. Keep it independent instead of closing or escalating the whole shard.
Open focused cron watchdog PR with proof supplied, but merge readiness is outside this inventory cleanup. Keep independent for maintainer review.
Open focused provider/auth-cache PR with unresolved proof and compatibility review requirements. Keep independent for normal review.
Open feature parity PR with proof supplied and active author follow-up. Keep independent for maintainer review.
